name_cn:
CLUNY BB Series | CODE:M46372
▪️Size: 28*20*10cm▪️
The new Cluny BB is here, another highly anticipated bestseller.
The iconic Monogram design is paired with a colorful shoulder strap. Casual yet sweet and refined, this low-key and practical design is perfect for going out or commuting. A very minimalist yet stylish look. I believe this will be another massive hit!
